law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts injuries or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro], or with one of these penalties alone.
  In the event the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

  Art. 399. If the blows or injuries result in illness or incapacity to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The punishment is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if the blows or injuries result in an incurable appearing disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
  The punishment is detention from five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or injuries are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuries: Person -> Bool
  IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuriesCausedDeath: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncurableDisease: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesCausedCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesCausedSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesCausedDeath: Person -> Bool
  BluesOrInjuriesResultedInIllnessOrIncapacityToPerformPersonalLabor: Person -> Bool
  ActedWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt401: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt400: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt399: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt398: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person:
    punishedArt401(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuries(p) & 
      ~ (IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuriesCausedDeath(p)) = false & 
      IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuriesCausedDeath(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt400(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt399(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt398(p).

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt400(p) <=> 
      (BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncurableDisease(p) | BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) | BluesOrInjuriesCausedCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) | BluesOrInjuriesCausedSevereMutilation(p)) & 
      ~ IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuriesCausedDeath(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt401(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt399(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt398(p).

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt399(p) <=> 
      BluesOrInjuriesResultedInIllnessOrIncapacityToPerformPersonalLabor(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt400(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt401(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt398(p).

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt398(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictedBlowsOrInjuries(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesResultedInIllnessOrIncapacityToPerformPersonalLabor(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncurableDisease(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesCausedIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesCausedCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesCausedSevereMutilation(p) & 
      ~ BluesOrInjuriesCausedDeath(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt399(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt400(p) & 
      ~ punishedArt401(p).

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 200.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 0.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 100.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 26.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~ ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 100.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.

  !p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
}

case.text: During a football match, Tom tackles his opponent Lars hard but within the rules. Lars falls and breaks his leg. He cannot work for two months. Tom did not act with premeditation. The tackle was intentional (a normal tackle), but not intended to cause injury outside of the game.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Tom is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Tom is punished under Article 399.
No. Lars is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
